nameJP: 忍妖 フォークテイル
effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), you may look at seven cards from the top of your deck. If you do, choose up to one normal unit with "Stealth" in its card name or  [Glitter] from among them, put it into your soul, and shuffle your deck.
flavorTextEN: Dancing together with strangers is quite fun!

nameJP: 焔の巫女 アメリア
effectEN: [ACT](RC):If you have a vanguard with "Nirvana" in its card name, and your opponent's vanguard is grade 3 or greater, COST  [Counter Blast (1) & put this unit into your soul], choose up to one unit card with "Nirvana" in its card name from your hand, and ride it as [Stand]. If you rode, you cannot ride by card effects until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Thus, the prayers will strike the heavens, and the dragon of Chakrabarthi will be reborn.

nameJP: 尖鋭竜 エオラフィアス
effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks or boosts, COST  [Soul Blast (1)] and this unit gets [Power]+5000 for each of your other grade 1 or less rear-guards until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: They gather together and sink their fangs in their target. Fiercely and savagely.

effectEN:
[CONT]:When this card would be discarded for the cost of your vanguard with "Overlord" in its card name's ability, it may be regarded as discarding two cards.
[AUTO]:When this card is discarded from hand for the cost of your vanguard with "Overlord" in its card name's ability, you may call this card to your back row (RC). If you called, this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Admiring the Wind of the Apocalypse's legends, the boy became a ferocious warrior.

effectEN: [CONT](RC/GC):If you have a rear-guard with originalDress, this unit gets [Power]+2000/[Shield]+5000.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
[CONT]:Sentinel (You may only have up to four cards with "[CONT]:Sentinel" in a deck.)
[AUTO]:When this unit is put on (GC), choose one of your units, and it cannot be hit until end of that battle. If your hand has two or more cards, choose a card from your hand, and discard it.
flavorTextEN: Capturing all enmity within the lightning, and reducing it to nothingness with the burning heat.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC) from hand, if you have two or more units that are normal units with "Blaze Maiden" in their card names, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], search your deck for up to one "Trickstar" or "Trickmoon", discard it, and shuffle your deck.
flavorTextEN: The spirits dance and play in the voices of the Blaze Maidens.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC) from hand, if you have two or more normal units with "Blaze Maiden" in their card names, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], search your deck for up to one "Trickstar" or "Trickmoon", discard it, and shuffle your deck.
flavorTextEN: The spirits dance and play in the voices of the Blaze Maidens.

nameJP: 装鋭竜 アダマロス
effectEN: [AUTO]:When this card becomes an originalDress, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose one of this card's outerDress units, and it gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn. (An outerDress is the unit that this card is the originalDress of)
flavorTextEN: The dragon followers of the moon, becomes the blades that support the sprites.

nameJP: 胸躍る焔の巫女 リノ
effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is rode upon by "Snuggling Blaze Maiden, Reiyu", search your deck for up to one "Trickstar", call it to (RC), and shuffle your deck.
[CONT](RC):During your turn, if you have a <Prayer Dragon> unit in the same column as this unit, this unit gets [Power]+5000.
flavorTextEN: A new egg?! My name is Rino. Nice to meet you!

nameJP: 装閃竜 ブラマーダ
effectEN: [AUTO]:When this card becomes an originalDress, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], draw two cards, choose a card from your hand, and discard it.
flavorTextEN: The single strike that aims true, becomes a piercing bolt that shakes up the battle.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this card's outerDress is retired from (RC) or (GC) during your opponent's turn, COST  [Soul Blast (2)], call this unit to an open (RC). (An outerDress is the unit that this card is the originalDress of)
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

nameJP: 忍獣 サイレントクロウ
effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC) by a card's ability, this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
[AUTO](RC)1/Turn :When your opponent's rear-guard in the same column as this unit is retired by your card's ability, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], and draw a card.
flavorTextEN: A spy that blends in and dances within the darkness takes flight one step ahead.

effectEN:
[CONT](RC):During your turn, if your (VC) has two or more Arms, this unit gets [Power]+5000.
[ACT](RC):If your (VC) has an Arms, COST  [retire this unit], choose an Arms card from your hand or drop, and Arm it to one of your vanguards. If you Armed a card, you cannot Arm your vanguard until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: As long as there's a will, the blade shall not break.

nameEN: Beautiful Bullet of Dust Storm, Jodie
effectEN: [ACT](RC)1/Turn :If you have a vanguard with "Eugene" in its card name, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], choose a grade 2 or less normal unit other than sentinel from your drop, and put it on the top or bottom of your deck.
flavorTextEN: You're in the way! I can't aim properly!

effectEN: [CONT](RC):During your turn, if your opponent's vanguard is grade 3 or greater, this unit gets [Power]+5000.
flavorTextEN: Cries of triumph run through the earth like lightning.

nameJP: 壊れたオモチャ
effectEN:
Play this if you have a vanguard with "Tamayura" in its card name!
Look at the top seven cards of your deck, choose up to one card with "Ririmi" in its card name and up to one card with "Rarami" in its card name from among them or your drop, put them into your soul, and shuffle your deck. If your soul has one or more cards each with "Ririmi" in its card name and with "Rarami" in its card name, draw a card. (You can choose one card each from among the looked cards and from your drop)
flavorTextEN: I'll be with you……until the end.

nameEN: Assaulting Bullet of Dust Storm, Oswald
effectEN: [AUTO](RC):At the end of the battle this unit boosted a vanguard with "Eugene" in its card name, if your opponent's vanguard is grade 3 or greater and they have no rear-guards, COST  [Counter Blast (1) & discard a card from your hand], choose one of your vanguards, [Stand] it, and increase or decrease its [Critical] and drive to 1 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When your unit is [Stand] by your card's ability, COST  [retire this unit], and draw a card.
flavorTextEN: Let's add to that valiant figure!

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):At the end of the battle this unit boosted a vanguard with "Nirvana" in its card name, COST  [put this unit into your soul], choose one of your rear-guards with originalDress, and it gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Guided by spirits, the scorching heat burns the earth.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this card becomes an originalDress, if your soul has no cards, Soul Charge (2).
flavorTextEN: A heavy strike that will shake the soul.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this card's outerDress is retired from (RC) or (GC) during your opponent's turn, COST  [Soul Blast (2)], call this unit to an open (RC). (An outerDress is the unit that this card is the originalDress of)
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

nameJP: 装壁竜 ビルスキル
effectEN: [AUTO]:When this card's outerDress is retired from (RC) or (GC) during your opponent's turn, COST  [Soul Blast (2)], call this unit to an open (RC). (An outerDress is the unit that this card is the originalDress of)
flavorTextEN: Survive to the very end. Then you will truly be a victor.

nameJP: 焔の巫女 レーゼル
effectEN: [CONT](RC/GC):If you have a rear-guard with originalDress, this unit gets [Power]+2000/[Shield]+5000.
flavorTextEN: That new look, somehow fits really well.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):During your turn, when your other unit is placed on (RC) in the same column as this unit, that placed unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: The raging lightning bestows mesmerizing power.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), COST  [put a normal unit with the same card name as any of your units from your drop on the bottom of your deck], and this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

nameEN: Assault Bullet of Dust Storm, Oswald
nameJP: 砂塵の襲弾 オズワルド
effectEN: [AUTO](RC):At the end of the battle this unit boosted a vanguard with "Eugene" in its card name, if your opponent's vanguard is grade 3 or greater and they have no rear-guards, COST  [Counter Blast (1) & discard a card from hand], choose one of your vanguards, [Stand] it, and increase or decrease its [Critical] and drive to 1 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Allow me to show you the hunts of the dust storm.

nameJP: 忍妖 コーマアウン
effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on a (RC) from hand, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose a card from your opponent's bind zone, and you may put it on the bottom of their deck. If you did not put a card, choose up to one unit card with "Stealth" in its card name and grade less than or equal to your vanguard from your bind zone, and call it to (RC).
flavorTextEN: The growl and flames that ward off maliciousness can drive evil away and call on friends.

nameJP: 桜花爛漫 忍鬼 猩々童子
effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (VC), look at the top five cards of your deck, choose up to two normal units with "Stealth" in their card names from among them, reveal them, put one of the revealed cards into your soul, bind the remaining revealed cards, and shuffle your deck.
[ACT](Bind Zone):If you have a grade 1 or greater vanguard with "Stealth" in its card name, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], and call this card to (RC).
flavorTextEN: With the sakura grudge of your heart believing intomorrow, slice them to pieces with all your might!

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):At the end of the battle this unit boosted a vanguard, if the boosted unit is [Stand], COST  [Soul Blast (2)], choose one of your opponent's front row rear-guards, retire it, choose one of your vanguards, and it gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN:
(D-PR/152): Burn it all, until not even the bones are left.
(D-PR/252): Those who resist the empire will all be incinerated.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit boosts a [Glitter], during that battle, this unit gets [Power]+5000.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

nameEN: Fallen of the Dragontree, Drago Vertical
effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose one of your (RC) without any Dragontree markers, and put a Dragontree marker.
[AUTO](RC)1/Turn :When your opponent's rear-guard is retired during your main phase, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], look at the top five cards of your deck, choose up to one grade 1 unit card from among them, call it to (RC), and shuffle your deck.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
[CONT]:When this card would be discarded for the cost of your vanguard with "Overlord" in its card name's ability, it may be regarded as discarding two cards.
[AUTO]:When this card is discarded from hand for the cost of your vanguard with "Overlord" in its card name's ability, you may call this card to your back row (RC). If you called, this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Admiring the Wind of the Apocalypse's legends, the boy became a ferocious warrior.

nameJP: 忍竜 レイジャスピア
effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), if your opponent's bind zone has a card, Soul Charge (1), and this unit gets [Power]+2000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [ACT](RC):If your (VC) has an Arms card, COST [put this unit into soul], choose a "Sealed Blaze Sword, Prithivih" or "Sealed Blaze Gun, Chandra" from your (VC), and until end of turn, the cost of the original [AUTO] ability of that card is reduced by Counter Blast (1).
flavorTextEN: Unleashing the seal of the blaze weapon.

nameJP: 装撃竜 ストレガリオ
effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC) from hand, if you have a vanguard with "Nirvana" in its card name, COST  [discard a card from hand], search your deck for up to one card with the [overDress] ability or up to one "Trickstar", reveal it and put it into your hand, and shuffle your deck.
[AUTO]:When this card becomes an originalDress, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose a "Trickstar" from your drop, and call it to (RC).
flavorTextEN: These guns fire with sheer spirit, so they never run out of bullets!

effectEN: [CONT](RC):During the battle this unit boosted a unit with originalDress, this unit gets [Power]+5000.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

nameJP: 焔の巫女 マディソン
effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit boosts "Blaze Maiden, Addison", you may Soul Charge (2).
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), COST  [put a normal unit with the same card name as any of your units from drop on the bottom of deck], and this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Boiling and melting lava, waiting for the time to erupt.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit boosts a [Glitter], this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: The fireball it releases grazes the great earth, and creates a path into the enemy's formation.

nameJP: 焔の巫女 シャーディア
effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC) from hand, if you have two or more normal units with "Blaze Maiden" in their card names, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], search your deck for up to one "Trickstar" or "Trickmoon", discard it, and shuffle your deck.
flavorTextEN: The spirits dance and play in the voices of the Blaze Maidens.

nameJP: 封焔竜 サマーディ
effectEN:
[CONT](RC):During your turn, if your (VC) has two or more Arms, this unit gets [Power]+5000.
[ACT](RC):If your (VC) has an Arms, COST  [retire this unit], choose an Arms card from your hand or drop, and arm it to one of your vanguards. If you armed a card, you cannot arm your vanguard until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: As long as there's a will, the blade shall not break.

nameEN: Beautiful Bullet of Dust Storm, Jodi
nameJP: 砂塵の麗弾 ジョディ
effectEN: [ACT](RC)1/Turn :If you have a vanguard with "Eugene" in its card name, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], choose a grade 2 or less normal unit other than sentinel from your drop, and put it on the top or bottom of your deck.
flavorTextEN: You're in the way! I can't aim properly!

effectEN: [CONT](RC):During your turn, if your opponent's vanguard is grade 3 or greater, this unit gets [Power]+5000.
flavorTextEN: Cries of triumph run through the earth like lightning.

nameJP: 装潰竜 ガトヤガード
effectEN: [AUTO]:When this card becomes an originalDress, if your soul has no cards, Soul Charge (2).
flavorTextEN: A heavy strike that will shake the soul.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit boosts, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], choose one of the units this unit boosted, and until end of turn, it gets "[AUTO](VC/RC):When this unit's attack hits a vanguard, choose one of your opponent's rear-guards, and retire it.".
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose one of your (RC) without any Dragontree markers, and put a Dragontree marker.
[AUTO](RC)1/Turn :When your opponent's rear-guard is retired during your main phase, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], look at the top five cards of your deck, choose up to one grade 1 unit card from among them, call it to (RC), and shuffle your deck.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

nameJP: 龍樹の落胤 ドラコ・バティカル
effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose one of your (RC) without any Dragontree markers, and put a Dragontree marker.
[AUTO](RC)1/Turn :When your opponent's rear-guard is retired during your main phase, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], look at the top five cards of your deck, choose up to one grade 1 unit card from among them, call it to (RC), and shuffle your deck.
flavorTextEN: A fallen spawn of the Dragontree. The personification of faithless destruction.

effectEN:
[CONT]:This card cannot be ridden.
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), if your opponent's rear-guard was not retired this turn, retire this unit.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

nameJP: 焔の巫女 ハニーファ
effectEN:
[CONT]:This card cannot be ridden.
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), if your opponent's rear-guard was not retired this turn, retire this unit.
flavorTextEN: Let's be wrapped in the embers and dance one song.

effectEN:
[CONT](VC):If your opponent has one or less rear-guards, when you would ride "Scarlet Flame Bow General, Dipanel" from ride deck, you can ride without discarding a card from your hand.
[AUTO]:When this unit is rode upon, if your opponent has two or more rear-guards, you may call this card to (RC).
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):At the end of the battle this unit boosted, if any player's rear-guard was retired this turn, COST  [bind this unit face down], and draw a card.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [ACT](RC):If your (VC) has an Arms card, COST [put this unit into soul], choose a "Sealed Blaze Sword, Prithivih" or "Sealed Blaze Gun, Chandra" from your (VC), and until end of turn, the cost of the original [AUTO] ability of that card is reduced by Counter Blast (1).
flavorTextEN: Unleashing the seal of the blaze weapon.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit boosts, COST  [discard a card from hand], choose one of your vanguards, and this unit gets [Power]+2000 until end of that battle for every two of that unit's grade.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO](Back Row RC):When your vanguard with "Gandiva" in its card name attacks, if your bind zone has three or more cards, COST  [bind this unit face down], and Counter Charge (1).
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

nameJP: 装照竜 グレイルミラ
effectEN: [AUTO]:When this card becomes an originalDress, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], look at the top seven cards of your deck, choose up to two cards with "Vairina" in their card names from among them, reveal them, choose up to one of the revealed cards, put it into your hand, discard the rest of the revealed cards, and shuffle your deck.
flavorTextEN: Prayers will deliver. So long as light shines in our hearts.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit boosts a grade 3 or greater unit, if your opponent's vanguard is grade 3 or greater, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], and this unit gets [Power]+10000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
(After a set order is played, put it into the order zone.)
[AUTO]:When this card is put into the order zone or discarded from hand for the cost of your vanguard's ability, if you have a vanguard with "Nirvana" in its card name, draw a card.
[CONT](Order Zone):If you have a vanguard with "Nirvana" in its card name, when your rear-guard with "Vairina" in its card name would be put into the deck or bind zone by your opponent's card effect, put all of the "Trickstar" from that unit's originalDress  into your hand, and put that unit and the rest of its originalDress into the drop.
flavorTextEN: The spirit clad in prayers shall stand up as many times as possible.

effectEN:
[CONT](RC):If your vanguard was placed by riding from a unit with "Musashid Armor " in its card name, and you persona rode this turn, this unit gets [Power]+10000.
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), if you have a card with "Musashid Armor" in its card name on your (VC) or in your soul, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], and draw a card.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

nameJP: 忍妖 コダマ
effectEN:
[CONT]:This card is also regarded as "Stealth Fiend, Forktail".
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), you may look at seven cards from the top of your deck. If you do, choose up to one normal unit with "Stealth" in its card name or  [Glitter] from among them, put it into your soul, and shuffle your deck.
flavorTextEN: Currently unknown.

nameJP: 装甲竜 マウントキャノン
effectEN: [AUTO](Front Row RC):When your grade 0 unit attacks, this unit and the unit that attacked get [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: The cannons on its back are able to send support fire in all directions.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks, if you have a vanguard with "Overlord" in its card name, this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of that battle. Then, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose one of your opponent's grade 2 or less rear-guards, and retire it.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

nameJP: 焔の巫女 レイユ
effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is rode upon by "Chakrabarthi Divine Dragon, Nirvana", COST  [Soul Blast (1)], search your deck for up to one "Vairina", reveal it and put it into your hand, and shuffle your deck.
[CONT](VC/RC):During the battle this unit attacked, this unit gets [Power]+2000.
flavorTextEN: Stop it, Rino. Can't you see you are scaring the egg?

nameJP: 焔の巫女 ターニャ
effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose a grade 0 card from your drop, and call it to (RC).
[AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], choose one of your grade 0 units, and it gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Showered in the hopes of many, the egg was reborn with divinity.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), if your opponent has no units in the same column as this unit, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], and this unit gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

nameJP: 燃え盛れ、清らかなる祈りよ
effectEN: If your damage zone has three or more cards, choose one of your units, and it gets [Power]+15000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: Until the wishes reach the heavens, the "Blaze Maidens" continue to pray.

nameEN: Cataclysmic Bullet of Dust Storm, Randor
nameJP: 砂塵の凶弾 ランドール
effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is rode upon by "Heavy Artillery of Dust Storm, Eugene", draw a card, choose up to one card from your drop, and put it into your soul.
[AUTO](VC/RC):When this unit attacks, if your opponent has two or less rear-guards, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], Soul Charge (1), and this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: Reduce their pawns with certainty. Eventually the enemy will be checkmated.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), choose one of your opponent's rear-guards, and you may move it to your opponent's open front row (RC).

[AUTO]:When this unit is rode upon by a unit with "Overlord" in its card name, call this card to (RC).
[ACT](RC)1/Turn :If you have a vanguard with "Overlord" in its card name, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], and this unit and all of your vanguards get [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: The empire's strongest dragon knight is renowned for defeating thousands.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), COST  [Counter Blast (1) & Soul Blast (1)], choose one of your opponent's grade 2 or greater rear-guards, and retire it.
flavorTextEN: Target spotted! This one's mine, alright?

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), COST  [Counter Blast (2)], Soul Charge (1), choose one of your opponent's rear-guards, and retire it.
flavorTextEN: Wanna try touching? Only if you're prepared to turn to ash, that is.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit intercepts, if your opponent has two or less rear-guards, this unit gets [Shield]+10000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: I'm better than the others when it comes to shooting down closing in targets.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit intercepts, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], and this unit gets [Shield]+5000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: 'pologies, I can't let you just pass like that.

effectEN: Choose one of your vanguards, and until end of turn, it gets "[CONT](VC):When all of your units would attack, they may attack your opponent's back row rear-guard.".
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

nameJP: いつか届く祈り
effectEN:
Play this with COST  [Soul Blast (1)]!
If you have a rear-guard with the [overDress] ability, choose one of your units, and it gets [Power]+15000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: Believe as you continue to pray. That is the key to having your wish granted.

nameJP: 荒食竜 ハンガーザウルス
effectEN: [CONT](RC):During your turn, this unit gets [Power]+5000, and if your opponent's front row has a rear-guard, this unit cannot attack the vanguard.
flavorTextEN: It leaves the "feast" for the very end.

nameEN: Stealth Rogue of Iron Blade, Oshikuni
nameJP: 鉄刀の忍鬼 オシクニ
effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks, if your opponent has two or less rear-guards, this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: If it's just this number, ol' me can clear it up alone.

nameJP: 争闘の忍鬼 フドウマル
effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit's attack hits, COST  [discard a card from your hand], and draw a card.
flavorTextEN: A beating alone won't settle things. So, what are you gonna do about it?

effectEN:
[ACT](RC):If your vanguard is "Heavy Artillery of Dust Storm, Eugene", COST  [Soul Blast (1) & [Rest] this unit], choose one of your opponent's rear-guards, and retire it.
[AUTO](RC):At the start of your battle phase, if your opponent has one or less rear-guards, [Stand] this unit, and this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
Play this with COST  [Counter Blast (1)]!
Choose one of your units, and it gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn. Choose a "Vairina" from your drop, and put it into your hand.
flavorTextEN: With fiercely burning passion, the sprites forged their fighting spirits anew.

effectEN:
[overDress]-"Trickstar" (You may place it by stacking it on the specified unit instead of normal calling it to (RC))
[AUTO](RC):When this unit in the [overDress] state attacks a vanguard, this unit gets [Power]+10000 until end of that battle. Then, COST  [Soul Blast (2)], choose one of your opponent's rear-guards, and retire it.
flavorTextEN: The resonance of prayers shall call forth the sprite's new form.

effectEN: [overDress]-"Trickstar" (You may place it by stacking it on the specified unit instead of normal calling it to (RC))

[overDress]-"Trickstar" (You may place it by stacking it on the specified unit instead of normal calling it to (RC))
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), if it [overDress], COST  [Counter Blast (1)], draw two cards, and this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Limitless potential. Capable of taking on any form.

effectEN:
[overDress]-"Trickstar" (You may place it by stacking it on the specified unit instead of normal calling it to (RC))
[AUTO](Hand):At the end of the battle your "Trickstar" attacked a vanguard, if your vanguard is "Chakrabarthi Divine Dragon, Nirvana", COST  [Soul Blast (2)], [overDress] this card on your "Trickstar" on (RC) as [Stand], and Counter Charge (1).
[CONT](RC/GC):If this unit is in the [overDress] state, this unit gets [Power]+10000/[Shield]+10000. (Active on opponent's turn too)
flavorTextEN: Responding in the midst of the fierce battle to the prayers that echo like screams of grief.

nameJP: 焔の巫女 エルバ
effectEN: [ACT](RC)1/Turn :COST  [Counter Blast (1) & [Rest] three rear-guards with "Blaze Maiden" in their different card names], draw a card, choose one of your vanguards, and it gets "[CONT](VC):All of your front row units get [Power]+10000." until end of turn.
flavorTextEN:
(D-PR/092): Preparations all good! Let's rev it up~!
(D-PR/237): With prayers and conviction. To keep the light ablaze.

effectEN:
Play this with COST  [Counter Blast (1)]!
If your vanguard is "Heavy Artillery of Dust Storm, Eugene", choose one of your vanguards, it gets [Power]+10000 until end of that battle, at the end of that battle, choose one of the rear-guards that boosted for that battle, and retire it.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit's attack hits, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose a card with the [overDress] ability from your drop, and put it into your hand.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When your grade 0 rear-guard attacks, COST  [Counter Blast (1) & retire this unit], and the unit that attacked gets [Power]+10000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), choose one of your opponent's rear-guards, and you may move it to your opponent's open front row (RC).
flavorTextEN: Its anger makes even the earth's crust tremble.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit intercepts, if your opponent has two or less rear-guards, this unit gets [Shield]+10000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: Shooting at approaching foes is a skill at which I'm better than others.

nameJP: 火竜爆撃
effectEN: Choose one of your vanguards, and until end of turn, it gets "[CONT](VC):All of your units can attack your opponent's back row rear-guard when they would attack.".
flavorTextEN: In the battlefield of dragons, there are no safe spots.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When your rear-guard is placed, if it was an [overDress], this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: The raging flames pulsate and burn with greater ferocity.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose one of your vanguards, and it gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

nameJP: 砂塵の榴砲 ダスティン
effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), if your vanguard is "Heavy Artillery of Dust Storm, Eugene", COST  [put a card from your hand into your soul], draw a card, choose one of your opponent's grade 2 or greater rear-guards, and retire it.
[AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], and this unit gets [Power]+2000 until end of that battle for each of your opponent's open (RC).
flavorTextEN: The messenger has been dispatched. Now, let us take down the citadel.

effectEN: [CONT](RC):If your vanguard's attack hit this turn, this unit gets [Power]+10000.
flavorTextEN: Roaring fist!! Descending thunder!!

nameEN: Steel Bullet of Dust Storm, Ethan
nameJP: 砂塵の剛弾 イーサン
effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When your vanguard's attack hits, COST  [retire this unit], draw a card, and Counter Charge (1).
flavorTextEN: The roar resounded across the battlefield like a flash of lightning.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit's attack hits, COST  [retire this unit], draw a card, choose one of your opponent's rear-guards, and retire it.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit is boosted, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose one of your opponent's grade 2 or lower rear-guards, retire it, and this unit gets [Power]+2000 until end of that battle.

nameJP: 封焔竜 ハリバドラ
effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (VC) by riding from "Sealed Blaze Dragon, Namorkahr", choose an Arms card from your drop, and put it into your hand.
[AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks, if your vanguard is Armed, this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: The lost blaze wavers wildly in the midst of unfathomable loneliness.
You can choose to avoid this lightning strike, or grit your teeth and bear it.
